## Meeting Purpose

[To train Bruno on the hiring process for managing editors and account managers at GrowthX.ai, focusing on using the Workable platform.](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The company aims to hire an average of 10 people per month, targeting 80 employees by year-end (currently at 17)](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [The hiring process involves multiple stages: application review, video interview, assessment, and final interview](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Bruno is tasked with initial candidate vetting, moving qualified candidates through the pipeline quickly and efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Pay range for managing editors is typically $4-6K/month, with some flexibility for exceptional candidates](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Workable Platform Overview

  - [Marcel demonstrated how to use Workable for candidate management](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Key features: application review, video interview requests, assessment sending, and interview scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Automated disqualification feature is currently not working properly (only applying thumbs down, not moving candidates)](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

### Candidate Evaluation Criteria

  - [Primary factors: communication skills, relevant experience (SEO, editing, content management), and salary expectations](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Look for candidates with experience at reputable publications or brands](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Red flags: very short video responses, inability to communicate clearly, or vastly mismatched salary expectations](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)

### Hiring Process Workflow

1.  Review applications: Move 50%+ of thumbs-up and 95% of starred candidates to video interview
2.  Send video interview requests: Use templated emails, customize if needed
3.  Review video responses: Check for communication skills and motivation
4.  Send assessments: Evaluate workplace personality and skills
5.  Final review: Compile strong candidates for interview scheduling with Kyle

### Hiring Targets and Strategy

  - [Aiming to hire managing editors, account managers, and some strategists](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Keeping a warm pipeline of candidates, even if immediate hiring is not possible](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Ideal scenario: Group new hires to start together (e.g., first of the month) for easier onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to focus on clearing the backlog of applications, moving qualified candidates through the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=2582.0)
  - [Connect with Kyle later in the week to discuss candidates ready for interviews](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Update email templates and personal signature in Workable](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [Communicate updates and strong candidates in the hiring channel for managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Continue to refine the process and address the auto-disqualification issue in Workable](https://fathom.video/share/qznNpBCsBN9U-zCHJYeSnSu-6iXZw837?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
